name: @wxyc/streaming-url-remediation
description: One-shot host remediation: rewrite album_metadata + flowsheet rows whose spotify_url is not a Spotify host (or apple_music_url is not an Apple host) so each column holds only a host-correct value — relocating a real link out of the wrong slot and nulling an unrecoverable foreign value so the read path synthesizes the search fallback. Pure local host arbitration, no LML. Batched UPDATE + ANALYZE per table. Dry-run by default; pass --execute to write. Depends on #1712 (ingestion guard). BS#1715.
